What We Do

Complete ED
Transformation

From greenfield build to continuous optimisation — every dimension covered.

01
🏗️
ED Setup from Scratch
Full design and commissioning — infrastructure, equipment, staffing models and operational readiness built to international benchmarks.
→
02
📋
Protocols & SOPs
Evidence-based clinical protocols, triage systems and SOPs tailored to your hospital's case mix — JCI-aligned from day one.
→
03
🎓
Training & Education
Structured programmes for physicians, nurses and paramedics — ACLS, trauma, paediatric emergencies and simulation-based learning.
→
04
📊
Clinical Audit & QI
Audit frameworks, KPI dashboards, M&M reviews and improvement cycles that produce measurable clinical outcomes — not just reports.
→
05
💻
Telemedicine & Remote EM
On-demand emergency medicine teleconsultation for hospitals without a resident EM specialist — real-time clinical decision support.
→
06
🚀
Innovation Hub Conversion
AI triage, point-of-care diagnostics, digital workflows and a culture of continuous learning — turning your ER into a centre of excellence.
→

About the Founder

Dr. Taimoor Hameed
MRCEM · FRCEM

A physician shaped by two worlds. Holding MRCEM and FRCEM — the Royal College of Emergency Medicine's highest Fellowship, earned through rigorous training and examination in the United Kingdom — Dr. Taimoor is actively practising as a Locum Emergency Physician across NHS hospitals in London. The NHS, one of the world's most demanding emergency medicine environments, is where his clinical instincts were forged.

As Lead Emergency Medicine Consultant at Evercare Hospital Lahore — one of Pakistan's premier private hospitals — he has taken that NHS standard and applied it on home ground: building EDs from scratch, embedding evidence-based protocols, leading audit cycles, and converting conventional ERs into measurable centres of clinical excellence.

"The NHS taught me that a great emergency system is not built in a crisis — it is built before one."

How We Work

From First Call to
Full Operationality

A structured, milestone-driven engagement. No ambiguity. No hidden scope.

01
Discovery & Assessment
We audit your ED — infrastructure, staffing, volumes, mortality data, patient satisfaction — and produce a gap analysis against international benchmarks.
02
Blueprint & Roadmap
A bespoke transformation blueprint: physical layout, clinical protocols, staffing model, technology stack, and a 90-day delivery roadmap with milestones.
03
Implementation
On-site and remote delivery — protocol rollout, staff training, system configuration and operational go-live, with hands-on clinical leadership throughout.
04
Sustain & Optimise
Retainer support: monthly audit reviews, KPI tracking, protocol updates and continuous improvement cycles to sustain and grow clinical excellence.
